bundleText:
RESTRICTED — PROSECUTION DISCLOSURE BUNDLE

URN: 26/DA/024
Defendant: Ashleigh Merritt
Court: Retail Court Centre

=== SECTION: COVER_INDEX ===

INDEX

Document | Pages | Note
Charge sheet | 1 |
MG5 case summary | 2-3 |
MG6C disclosure schedule | 4 |
Officer MG11 | 5 |
CCTV still images | 6-7 |
Exhibit list | 8 |
Court listing | 9 |
Master CCTV footage camera 4 | 10-12 | Listed — export not attached to bundle

=== SECTION: CHARGE ===

R v Ashleigh Merritt

Statement of Offence:
Theft from a shop, contrary to section 1(1) and 7(1) of the Theft Act 1968

Particulars of Offence:
On 8 May 2026 stole goods from a department store.

=== SECTION: MG5 ===

MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT

URN: 26/DA/024
Officer in case: PC Ortiz 9912

=== SECTION: MG5 ===

Headline Summary
CCTV still images are served. Master CCTV footage, full export, continuity, audit trail, and recognition/ID basis are outstanding. Identification from stills alone is not safely confirmed on current papers.

=== SECTION: MG6 ===

MG6C — UNUSED MATERIAL SCHEDULE

MG6C/CCTV/01 — CCTV still images AM/CCTV/01 — served on bundle.
MG6C/CCTV/02 — Master CCTV footage camera 4 — outstanding — not on bundle.
MG6C/CCTV/03 — Full CCTV export (native format) — referred on MG6C — export not attached.
MG6C/CCTV/04 — Continuity and provenance statement — outstanding.
MG6C/CCTV/05 — Audit trail / source file hash record — outstanding.
MG6C/CCTV/06 — Recognition / ID basis — outstanding — not on bundle.

=== SECTION: MG11 ===

MG11 — OFFICER STATEMENT (PC Ortiz 9912)

1. I attended following a report of shop theft.
2. CCTV still images AM/CCTV/01 are served on this bundle. Master footage and full export are NOT served.
3. Stills show a person in relevant aisle. Image quality is limited. I cannot rely on stills alone for positive identification. Recognition statement and ID basis are NOT on bundle.

=== SECTION: CCTV_STILLS ===

EXHIBIT AM/CCTV/01 — CCTV STILL IMAGES (served)

=== SECTION: CCTV_STILLS ===

Camera 4 — menswear aisle — still frames only.
Note: Stills served. Master recording and continuity outstanding per MG6C/CCTV/02–05.

=== SECTION: EXHIBIT_LIST ===

EXHIBIT LIST — R v Ashleigh Merritt

AM/CCTV/01 — CCTV still images — SERVED — pages 6-7
AM/CCTV/02 — Master CCTV footage — NOT SERVED
AM/CCTV/03 — Full CCTV export — REFERRED ONLY

=== SECTION: LISTING ===

First hearing listed — 22 September 2026, Retail Court Centre.
